nodes.name: 小种群风险
nodes.summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 鸠鸽科
nodes.summary: 鸠鸽科（Columbidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸽形目
nodes.summary: 鸽形目（Columbiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: Mariana fruit dove
nodes.summary: Mariana fruit dove（Mariana fruit dove，学名 Ptilinopus roseicapilla），分类上属于鸽形目，并归入鸠鸽科，在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、小种群风险。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联210种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等210种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: In 2005, the Mariana fruit dove was originally chosen as the official mascot of the 2006 Micronesian Games in Saipan. However, the official website for the games shows a tropicbird as the official symbol instead of the Mariana fruit dove. left|thumb The species faces extinction due to habitat loss throughout its range

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The program began in 1993. Due to ongoing habitat loss, limited range, small population size and invasive alien species, the Mariana fruit dove is evaluated as near threatened on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Mariana fruit dove 属于目 鸽形目。

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Mariana fruit dove 属于科 鸠鸽科。

links.label: 属于目
